## Problem to Solve

<!-- What problem or limitation does this feature address? Be specific. -->

## Desired Behavior

<!-- Describe the behavior you want. Include example commands, API calls, or UI flows if relevant. -->

## Use Case / Target User

<!-- Who benefits from this? Server admin, regular user, org owner, API consumer? Describe the scenario. -->

## Constraints / Non-Goals

<!-- What is explicitly out of scope for this request? Any compatibility constraints? -->

## Compatibility Expectations

<!-- Does this need to match the behavior of another tool, protocol, or standard? -->

- [ ] Feature parity with an existing tool (specify below)
- [ ] New behavior not currently available elsewhere
- [ ] API/route parity required (specify endpoint below)

<!-- If feature parity: which tool/version/behavior? If API parity: which endpoint? -->
